goal: Inspect the workspace, summarize the task, run available tests, and report the results concisely with any missing files or missing tests noted.

steps.reason: Identify the files present and any obvious missing inputs or test assets.
Summarize the workspace task and note any missing files or absent tests relevant to the request.
Execute available tests to determine whether they pass.
Provide a concise final report with workspace summary and test results.

done_when: Workspace contents have been inspected and summarized.
Available tests have been run and their status reported, including any missing tests or files if applicable.
